title: RAND Australia
description: RAND Australia is the RAND Corporation's subsidiary in Canberra. RAND Australia has conducted high-impact research on national security and defence, cybersecurity, countering violent extremism, capability acquisition and sustainment, workforce training, health safety standards, and higher education.
text:
Defence
RAND Australia conducts research on complex strategy, acquisition, force employment, and administrative challenges facing Australia’s defence leadership. Our strategic work focuses on the most pressing and difficult strategy, policy, and defence stewardship concerns of high-level policymakers. Our acquisition and management analyses help Australian leaders control costs and hedge against risk.
National Security
RAND Australia has significant global experience supporting national security agencies that are confronted with emerging technological, social, political, and demographic challenges. RAND has provided support across these types of organisations, both to address immediate threats and to better position organisations to respond to future threats.
Emerging Technologies
RAND Australia has undertaken various analyses of emerging technologies to inform government of associated opportunities and risks. These technologies include those in the cyber and space domains, as well as the application of Artificial Intelligence and technologies associated with autonomy and energy.
Social and Economic Policy
RAND Australia has strong capabilities for improving the health, safety, security, prosperity, and resilience of people and communities in Australia. RAND’s research has been applied to improve outcomes in community health, criminal justice, and the environment. RAND also has a long history of health research to improve service delivery and overall system performance. RAND’s experience assessing the effectiveness of educational programs, strategic reforms, and labour policies spans decades.
RAND Australia differs from a traditional management consulting firm in that we rely upon data-driven solutions and strong analytic methods. We conduct rigorous, objective research and analysis on behalf of sponsors to help improve policy and decisionmaking.
Find out more about what the RAND Australia office can do for you.
Work with Us
